name: Altera Corporation
description: Altera Corporation, formerly Intel's Programmable Solutions Group, is a leading provider of field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs), system-on-chip (SoC) FPGAs, and complementary technologies. Re-established as an independent company under Intel's ownership, Altera delivers flexible, high-performance programmable logic solutions designed to accelerate innovation across diverse industries, including telecommunications, data centers, automotive, industrial, and aerospace.
